title: FX Risk Modeller
subtitle: Model the impact of sterling depreciation on your import costs and product margins. Find out which lines go below your minimum margin — before the currency moves.
labelProductLines: Product lines — add each line separately for a breakdown
riskBannerTitle: {n} product line falls below your {minMargin}% minimum in a severe scenario
riskBannerTitlePlural: {n} product lines fall below your {minMargin}% minimum in a severe scenario
riskBannerBody: {lines} — annual impact up to {amount} if sterling falls 15% against the {currency}.
allSafeMsg: All product lines stay above {minMargin}% margin even in a severe 15% depreciation scenario.
actionReviewPricing: Review pricing on {lines} — a {pp}pp margin loss needs a price increase or cost reduction to offset
actionForwardContract: Consider a forward currency contract to lock in the current GBP/{currency} rate on your next 3-6 months of purchases
actionSupplierGbp: Ask your suppliers about pricing in GBP or EUR to eliminate {currency} exposure entirely on new contracts
actionFxBuffer: Build a 10% FX buffer into your landed cost calculations for all {currency}-denominated purchases
actionSetAlert: Set a sterling alert — if GBP/{currency} falls more than 5% from today's rate, review pricing across all affected lines
btnAskDeep: Ask AskBiz to model this in full →
emptyTitle: Know your FX exposure before the rate moves
emptyBody: Enter your import currency, monthly spend, and product margins above. AskBiz will model mild, moderate, and severe depreciation scenarios and show you exactly which lines go below your minimum margin.
promptChina: I import from China in USD
promptEur: My biggest exposure is EUR suppliers
promptDollarPound: I buy in dollars and sell in pounds
